name: Crockpot Chicken Fettuccine
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 ounces Canned tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the chicken breasts in olive oil.
2. Place the chicken in the crock-pot.
3. Add green onions, garlic, tomatoes, and basil to the pot.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours.
5. Remove the chicken and cut into pieces.
6. Return the chicken pieces to the pot.
7. Stir in cream, egg yolks, and Parmesan cheese.
8. Cover and cook on High for 30 minutes to thicken.
9. While the sauce is thickening, cook fettuccine according to package directions; drain.
10. Add the cooked fettuccine, peas, and mushrooms to the pot.
11. Cover and cook on High for 30 to 60 minutes.
